lines.speaker: Jardric
lines.text: Hello there.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Who are you?

lines.speaker: Jardric
lines.text: I'm Jardric. Former boatman and now a researcher for Keldagrim. I'm here with the Varrock Museum to explore this island and discover its secrets.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: From boatman to researcher? That's quite the change.

lines.speaker: Jardric
lines.text: Aye that it is. I do miss it sometimes, but I get so many opportunities now that I never used to. Just look at us! We may well be the first to step foot on this island in centuries.

lines.speaker: Jardric
lines.text: If that isn't exciting, I don't know what is.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Very true. See you later.

lines.speaker: Jardric
lines.text: Goodbye for now.

lines.speaker: Jardric
lines.text: Hello. Wanting to go to Lithkren?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yes please.

lines.speaker: Jardric
lines.text: Not too bad. I've been working with the museum to investigate the dragonkin. After what happened they now consider me an expert.

lines.speaker: Jardric
lines.text: Don't worry though. I've still got enough time to look after this boat for you.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No thank you.

lines.speaker: Jardric
lines.text: Hello. Wanting to go back to Fossil Island?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yes please.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: How are things with you?

lines.speaker: Jardric
lines.text: Not too bad. I've been working with the museum to investigate the dragonkin. After what happened they now consider me an expert.

lines.speaker: Jardric
lines.text: Don't worry though. I've still got enough time to look after this boat for you.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No thank you.

lines.speaker: Jardric
lines.text: Well done.

lines.speaker: Jardric
lines.text: I have a question for you.
